framework.name: Marketplace vs Protocol Distinction
framework.description: This implementation reveals a key design choice: building a centralized marketplace with proprietary coordination infrastructure versus defining open protocols for decentralized agent discovery. Moveworks chose the former — controlling the coordination layer, discovery UX, and execution environment. The alternative (protocol-first approach) would enable cross-platform agent coordination but lose platform control and monetization leverage.
